title: Pyramids of Giza & Cairo Highlights
description: Explore the iconic Great Pyramids of Giza, the Sphinx, and the Egyptian Museum in Cairo. This private guided tour covers Egypt's most famous ancient landmarks with an expert Egyptologist, offering skip-the-line access and comfortable air-conditioned transport.
shortDescription: Private guided tour of the Pyramids, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum
highlights: Visit the Great Pyramid of Khufu — last standing Wonder of the Ancient World
Photo stop at the panoramic viewpoint of all three pyramids
See the Great Sphinx and Valley Temple up close
Explore the Egyptian Museum's Tutankhamun treasures

itinerary.title: Giza Plateau — Pyramids & Sphinx
itinerary.description: Morning pickup from your Cairo hotel. Drive to the Giza Plateau to explore the Great Pyramid of Khufu, Pyramid of Khafre, Pyramid of Menkaure, the Great Sphinx, and the Valley Temple. Lunch at a restaurant overlooking the pyramids.

itinerary.title: Egyptian Museum & Old Cairo
itinerary.description: Visit the world-renowned Egyptian Museum to see King Tutankhamun's golden mask and royal mummies. Explore Coptic Cairo and the vibrant Khan el-Khalili bazaar. Transfer to the airport or your next destination.

title: Luxor Valley of the Kings & Temples
description: Discover Luxor — the world's greatest open-air museum. Visit the Valley of the Kings, Karnak Temple, Luxor Temple, and the Temple of Hatshepsut on a private guided tour with an expert Egyptologist. Perfect for history lovers visiting Upper Egypt.
shortDescription: Explore ancient Thebes — temples, tombs & the Valley of the Kings
highlights: Enter royal tombs in the Valley of the Kings
Walk through the massive Karnak Temple complex
See Luxor Temple illuminated at sunset
Visit the mortuary Temple of Hatshepsut
Photo stop at the Colossi of Memnon

itinerary.title: Arrival & Karnak Temple
itinerary.description: Arrive in Luxor and transfer to your hotel. Afternoon visit to the awe-inspiring Karnak Temple complex — the largest ancient religious site ever built. Evening visit to Luxor Temple lit up at night.

itinerary.title: Valley of the Kings & West Bank
itinerary.description: Cross to Luxor's West Bank to explore the Valley of the Kings, where pharaohs like Tutankhamun and Ramses II were buried. Visit the Temple of Hatshepsut and the Colossi of Memnon.

itinerary.title: Free Morning & Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a free morning to explore Luxor's East Bank, visit the Luxor Museum, or shop at the local souq. Transfer to the airport or train station.

title: Nile Cruise — Luxor to Aswan
description: Sail the legendary Nile River aboard a 5-star cruise ship from Luxor to Aswan. Visit Edfu Temple, Kom Ombo, Philae Temple, and the Aswan High Dam. Includes all meals, guided excursions, and onboard entertainment — the quintessential Egypt experience.
shortDescription: 5-star Nile cruise with guided temple visits & all meals
highlights: 5-star luxury Nile cruise with sundeck pool
Guided visits to Edfu, Kom Ombo & Philae temples
Valley of the Kings & Karnak Temple excursions

itinerary.title: Board in Luxor — Karnak Temple
itinerary.description: Board your luxury cruise in Luxor. After lunch onboard, visit the magnificent Karnak Temple complex. Return for dinner and evening entertainment.

itinerary.title: Valley of the Kings & Sail to Edfu
itinerary.description: Morning excursion to the Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, and Colossi of Memnon. Afternoon sailing through Esna Lock toward Edfu.

itinerary.title: Edfu & Kom Ombo Temples
itinerary.description: Visit the perfectly preserved Temple of Horus at Edfu. Sail to Kom Ombo and explore the unique double temple dedicated to Sobek and Horus the Elder.

itinerary.title: Aswan — High Dam & Philae Temple
itinerary.description: Visit the Aswan High Dam, the Unfinished Obelisk, and the beautiful island Philae Temple dedicated to goddess Isis. Optional felucca ride at sunset.

itinerary.title: Disembarkation & Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast onboard. Disembark and transfer to Aswan Airport or train station for your onward journey.

title: Red Sea Diving & Snorkeling Adventure
description: Experience world-class diving and snorkeling in the crystal-clear waters of Hurghada on the Red Sea coast. Explore vibrant coral reefs, swim with tropical fish at Giftun Islands, and enjoy beachfront resort luxury. Ideal for water sports enthusiasts and beach lovers.
shortDescription: Coral reefs, tropical fish & beachfront luxury in Hurghada
highlights: Snorkel at Giftun Islands Marine National Park
Scuba diving at famous Red Sea dive sites
Glass-bottom boat tour over coral gardens
Quad biking in the Eastern Desert

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hurghada
itinerary.description: Arrive at Hurghada International Airport and transfer to your all-inclusive beachfront resort. Spend the afternoon relaxing by the pool or on the private beach.

itinerary.title: Giftun Islands Snorkeling Trip
itinerary.description: Full-day boat trip to Giftun Islands National Park. Snorkel over pristine coral reefs, swim with colorful tropical fish, and enjoy a beach BBQ lunch on a secluded island.

itinerary.title: Scuba Diving & Desert Safari
itinerary.description: Morning guided scuba dive at a top Red Sea site. Afternoon quad biking adventure through the Eastern Desert with a Bedouin tea stop.

itinerary.title: Beach Morning & Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final morning swim and breakfast before transferring to Hurghada Airport for your departure.

title: Abu Simbel & Aswan Explorer
description: Marvel at the colossal Abu Simbel temples of Ramses II — one of Egypt's most breathtaking monuments. Combined with a full Aswan exploration including Philae Temple, the High Dam, a felucca sail on the Nile, and a Nubian village visit. A must-do Upper Egypt itinerary.
shortDescription: Colossal Abu Simbel temples & Aswan's Nubian highlights
highlights: Abu Simbel — Ramses II's colossal rock-cut temples
Philae Temple on its picturesque island
Sunset felucca sail on the Nile

itinerary.title: Arrival in Aswan & Philae Temple
itinerary.description: Arrive in Aswan and transfer to your Nile-view hotel. Afternoon visit to the beautiful Philae Temple on Agilkia Island. Sunset felucca sail around Elephantine Island.

itinerary.title: Abu Simbel Excursion
itinerary.description: Early morning drive (or optional flight) to Abu Simbel to see the four colossal statues of Ramses II and the Temple of Nefertari. Return to Aswan for a Nubian village visit by boat.

itinerary.title: Aswan Highlights & Departure
itinerary.description: Visit the Aswan High Dam and the Unfinished Obelisk. Free time to browse the Aswan Souq for spices and handicrafts. Transfer to the airport.

title: Complete Egypt Discovery — 14 Days
description: The ultimate Egypt tour covering Cairo, the Pyramids, Luxor, a Nile cruise, Aswan, Abu Simbel, and Red Sea beach relaxation. This all-inclusive 14-day itinerary is the most comprehensive way to experience ancient wonders, Nile scenery, and tropical coastline in a single trip.
shortDescription: Cairo, Nile cruise, Abu Simbel & Red Sea — the ultimate Egypt trip
highlights: Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum
Valley of the Kings & Karnak Temple

itinerary.title: Welcome to Cairo
itinerary.description: Arrive at Cairo International Airport. Private transfer to your 5-star hotel. Evening orientation walk.

itinerary.title: Pyramids & Sphinx
itinerary.description: Full day at the Giza Plateau — Great Pyramids, Sphinx, Valley Temple, and Solar Boat Museum.

itinerary.title: Egyptian Museum & Old Cairo
itinerary.description: Visit the Egyptian Museum and explore Islamic Cairo — Citadel of Saladin and Khan el-Khalili.

itinerary.title: Fly to Luxor — Board Cruise
itinerary.description: Fly to Luxor, board your Nile cruise, and visit Karnak Temple.

itinerary.title: Valley of the Kings
itinerary.description: Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple, Colossi of Memnon, and Luxor Temple at sunset.

itinerary.title: Sailing to Edfu
itinerary.description: Relax on the sundeck as you sail through Esna Lock. Visit Edfu Temple in the afternoon.

itinerary.title: Kom Ombo to Aswan
itinerary.description: Visit Kom Ombo Temple and sail to Aswan. Evening felucca ride.

itinerary.title: Aswan Highlights
itinerary.description: Aswan High Dam, Unfinished Obelisk, and Philae Temple.

itinerary.title: Abu Simbel
itinerary.description: Early morning excursion to Abu Simbel temples. Farewell cruise dinner.

itinerary.title: Fly to Hurghada
itinerary.description: Disembark cruise, fly to Hurghada, and check into your beachfront resort.

itinerary.title: Red Sea Snorkeling
itinerary.description: Full-day snorkeling trip to Giftun Islands.

itinerary.title: Beach & Optional Diving
itinerary.description: Optional scuba diving or spa day at the resort.

itinerary.title: Desert Adventure
itinerary.description: Quad biking in the Eastern Desert with Bedouin dinner under the stars.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Hurghada Airport for your departure.

title: White Desert & Bahariya Oasis Safari
description: Journey into Egypt's Western Desert to explore the surreal White Desert chalk formations, the volcanic Black Desert, Crystal Mountain, and Bahariya Oasis. Camp under a blanket of stars and experience traditional Bedouin hospitality — an unforgettable off-the-beaten-path adventure.
shortDescription: Surreal desert landscapes, stargazing & Bedouin camping
highlights: Camp among the White Desert's mushroom-shaped chalk pillars
Drive through the volcanic Black Desert

itinerary.title: Cairo to Bahariya Oasis
itinerary.description: Depart Cairo early morning. Arrive in Bahariya Oasis to explore the town, visit the Golden Mummies Museum, and soak in natural hot springs.

itinerary.title: Black Desert, Crystal Mountain & White Desert
itinerary.description: 4x4 safari through the Black Desert's volcanic hills, a stop at Crystal Mountain, then into the otherworldly White Desert. Camp under the stars with a Bedouin BBQ.

itinerary.title: Desert Sunrise & Return to Cairo
itinerary.description: Wake to a spectacular desert sunrise. Breakfast among the chalk formations before the scenic drive back to Cairo.

title: Alexandria Mediterranean Day Trip
description: Discover the legendary city of Alexandria on a private day trip from Cairo. Founded by Alexander the Great, this Mediterranean gem features the Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Catacombs of Kom el-Shoqafa, Citadel of Qaitbay, and fresh-caught seafood — all in one action-packed day.
shortDescription: Greco-Roman ruins, the great library & Mediterranean seafood
highlights: Bibliotheca Alexandrina — modern tribute to the ancient library
Catacombs of Kom el-Shoqafa — Roman-era underground necropolis
Citadel of Qaitbay on the Mediterranean shore
Seafood lunch at a harbor-front restaurant
included: Private air-conditioned vehicle Cairo–Alexandria round trip

itinerary.title: Cairo to Alexandria & Full Day Tour
itinerary.description: Early morning departure from Cairo (approx. 2.5 hours). Visit the Catacombs of Kom el-Shoqafa, Pompey's Pillar, Roman Amphitheatre, Bibliotheca Alexandrina, and the Citadel of Qaitbay. Enjoy a seafood lunch on the Corniche before returning to Cairo.

title: Islamic Cairo & Khan el-Khalili Walking Tour
description: Immerse yourself in 1,000 years of Islamic architecture and Cairo's vibrant street life. Walk through Al-Muizz Street — the world's largest open-air Islamic museum — visit the Citadel of Saladin, Al-Azhar Mosque, and bargain for spices and souvenirs at the legendary Khan el-Khalili bazaar.
shortDescription: Medieval mosques, the Citadel & the legendary Khan bazaar
highlights: Walk Al-Muizz Street — UNESCO World Heritage zone
Citadel of Saladin with panoramic Cairo views
included: Traditional Egyptian tea at a historic café

itinerary.title: Islamic Cairo Walking Tour
itinerary.description: Pickup from your hotel. Visit the Citadel of Saladin for panoramic views, then walk along Al-Muizz Street past medieval mosques, madrasas, and caravanserais. Explore Al-Azhar Mosque and end at Khan el-Khalili bazaar with time to shop and enjoy Egyptian tea at the famous El-Fishawy café.

title: Sharm El Sheikh Snorkeling & Mount Sinai
description: Combine Red Sea marine paradise with a spiritual sunrise trek on Mount Sinai. Snorkel at Ras Mohammed National Park — one of the world's top dive sites — then climb the sacred mountain where Moses received the Ten Commandments. An unforgettable Sinai Peninsula adventure.
shortDescription: Ras Mohammed coral reefs & a sacred Mount Sinai sunrise trek
highlights: Snorkel at Ras Mohammed National Park
Sunrise trek to the summit of Mount Sinai (2,285 m)
Visit St. Catherine's Monastery — UNESCO World Heritage Site
Beachfront resort in Sharm El Sheikh
included: 3 nights beachfront hotel in Sharm El Sheikh

itinerary.title: Arrival in Sharm El Sheikh
itinerary.description: Arrive at Sharm El Sheikh Airport and transfer to your beachfront resort. Free afternoon to relax on the beach or explore Naama Bay.

itinerary.title: Ras Mohammed National Park Snorkeling
itinerary.description: Full-day boat trip to Ras Mohammed National Park. Snorkel over coral walls teeming with marine life at Shark Reef and Yolanda Reef.

itinerary.title: Mount Sinai Sunrise Trek
itinerary.description: Late evening departure to Mount Sinai. Begin the guided trek at 2 AM to reach the summit for a breathtaking sunrise. Descend to visit St. Catherine's Monastery. Return to Sharm El Sheikh for afternoon rest.

itinerary.title: Free Morning & Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a leisurely morning at the resort. Optional Dahab Blue Hole snorkeling trip. Transfer to the airport.

title: Luxor Hot Air Balloon Sunrise Experience
description: Soar above the Valley of the Kings at sunrise in a hot air balloon. Witness the ancient temples, the Nile River, and Luxor's West Bank from a breathtaking aerial perspective. A once-in-a-lifetime Egypt adventure.
shortDescription: Sunrise balloon flight over Luxor's ancient monuments
highlights: Sunrise flight over the Valley of the Kings
Panoramic views of Karnak and Luxor temples
See the Nile River from above

itinerary.title: Sunrise Balloon Flight
itinerary.description: Early morning pickup (around 4:30 AM). Transfer to the launch site on Luxor's West Bank. Watch the balloon inflate, then ascend into the sky as the sun rises over the ancient monuments. Float for approximately 45-60 minutes before landing. Return to your hotel by 8 AM.

title: Siwa Oasis Desert Retreat
description: Escape to the remote Siwa Oasis — Egypt's most enchanting desert paradise. Explore ancient ruins, swim in natural springs, and experience Berber culture in this off-the-beaten-path adventure near the Libyan border.
shortDescription: Remote oasis adventure with hot springs & ancient ruins
highlights: Explore the ancient Temple of the Oracle
4x4 desert safari to the Great Sand Sea
Stargazing in one of Earth's darkest skies

itinerary.title: Cairo to Siwa
itinerary.description: Depart Cairo early morning for the 8-hour scenic drive through the Western Desert. Arrive in Siwa and check into your eco-lodge. Evening walk through the old town.

itinerary.title: Siwa Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit the Temple of the Oracle (where Alexander the Great was declared a god), the Mountain of the Dead tombs, and swim in Cleopatra's Spring. Afternoon at Fatnas Island for sunset.

itinerary.title: Great Sand Sea Safari
itinerary.description: Full-day 4x4 adventure into the Great Sand Sea. Sandboarding on massive dunes, visit hot and cold springs, and watch the sunset over endless golden sands.

itinerary.title: Return to Cairo
itinerary.description: Morning free to explore Siwa's markets. Depart for Cairo after lunch.

title: Egyptian Museum & Tutankhamun Treasures
description: Discover 5,000 years of Egyptian history at the world-famous Egyptian Museum in Cairo. See King Tutankhamun's golden mask, royal mummies, and over 120,000 ancient artifacts with an expert Egyptologist guide.
shortDescription: Guided tour of Cairo's Egyptian Museum & royal mummies
included: All entrance fees including Mummies Hall

itinerary.title: Egyptian Museum Tour
itinerary.description: Morning pickup from your Cairo hotel. Spend 3-4 hours exploring the Egyptian Museum's highlights with your Egyptologist. See the Tutankhamun collection, royal mummies, and ancient treasures. Return to your hotel by early afternoon.

title: Felucca Sailing & Nubian Village Experience
description: Sail the Nile on a traditional felucca boat and visit a colorful Nubian village near Aswan. Experience authentic Egyptian hospitality, taste traditional food, and learn about Nubian culture and history.
shortDescription: Traditional Nile sailing & authentic Nubian village visit
highlights: Sail on a traditional wooden felucca

itinerary.title: Felucca & Nubian Village
itinerary.description: Afternoon pickup from your Aswan hotel. Board a traditional felucca and sail to a Nubian village. Explore the colorful streets, visit a local home, enjoy traditional hospitality, and sail back as the sun sets over the Nile.

title: Cairo Food Tour & Local Markets
description: Taste your way through Cairo's vibrant food scene. Sample authentic Egyptian dishes — koshari, ful medames, ta'ameya, and more — while exploring local markets and hidden culinary gems with a foodie guide.
shortDescription: Authentic Egyptian cuisine & bustling Cairo markets
highlights: Visit local markets and street vendors

itinerary.title: Cairo Food Adventure
itinerary.description: Morning pickup. Explore Cairo's food scene — from famous koshari shops to hidden falafel stands. Visit local markets, taste fresh juices, and end with traditional Egyptian desserts and tea.

title: Dahab Blue Hole Snorkeling Day Trip
description: Snorkel at the legendary Blue Hole in Dahab — one of the world's most famous dive sites. Explore vibrant coral reefs, swim with tropical fish, and enjoy the laid-back Bedouin beach town atmosphere.
shortDescription: Snorkel the famous Blue Hole & explore Dahab's reefs
highlights: Free time to explore the town
included: Round-trip transfer from Sharm El Sheikh

itinerary.title: Blue Hole Adventure
itinerary.description: Morning pickup from Sharm El Sheikh. Drive to Dahab (approx. 1 hour). Snorkel at the Blue Hole and nearby reefs. Enjoy a beachside lunch and free time in Dahab before returning to Sharm.

title: Luxor Temple Sound & Light Show
description: Experience Luxor Temple after dark with the spectacular Sound & Light Show. Watch as the ancient columns and statues are illuminated while narration brings 3,400 years of history to life.
shortDescription: Evening spectacle at illuminated Luxor Temple
highlights: Sound & Light Show at Luxor Temple
See the temple illuminated at night

itinerary.title: Luxor Temple by Night
itinerary.description: Evening pickup from your Luxor hotel. Arrive at Luxor Temple for the Sound & Light Show (approx. 1 hour). Return to your hotel after the show.

title: Giza Pyramids Camel Ride at Sunset
description: Ride a camel around the Giza Pyramids as the sun sets over the Sahara. Capture iconic photos with the pyramids glowing in golden light — a quintessential Egypt experience.
shortDescription: Sunset camel ride with pyramid views
highlights: Camel ride around the Giza Plateau

itinerary.title: Sunset Camel Ride
itinerary.description: Afternoon pickup from your hotel. Arrive at the Giza Plateau, meet your camel, and ride around the pyramids as the sun sets. Enjoy Bedouin tea before returning to your hotel.

title: Hurghada Glass-Bottom Boat & Snorkeling
description: Explore the Red Sea's underwater world without getting wet — then dive in! This family-friendly trip combines a glass-bottom boat tour with snorkeling at pristine coral reefs near Hurghada.
shortDescription: See coral reefs from above & below the surface

itinerary.title: Glass-Bottom Boat & Snorkeling
itinerary.description: Morning pickup from your Hurghada hotel. Board the glass-bottom boat and cruise over coral reefs. Stop at two snorkeling sites to swim with tropical fish. Return to your hotel by early afternoon.

title: Pyramids Sound & Light Show Evening
description: Watch the Great Pyramids and Sphinx come alive with the famous Sound & Light Show. Lasers, lights, and narration tell the story of ancient Egypt against the backdrop of the world's most iconic monuments.
shortDescription: Spectacular laser show at the Giza Pyramids
highlights: Sound & Light Show at the Pyramids

itinerary.title: Pyramids by Night
itinerary.description: Evening pickup from your hotel. Arrive at the Giza Plateau for the Sound & Light Show (approx. 1 hour). The Sphinx 'narrates' the history of ancient Egypt as the pyramids are illuminated. Return to your hotel after the show.
